mined_patterns.name: high_speed_low_distance
mined_patterns.description: Unsafe behavior caused by high speed combined with insufficient distance.

mined_patterns.name: weather_risk_low_distance
mined_patterns.description: Unsafe behavior caused by risky weather and insufficient distance.

iterations.proposed_rule: distance >= 2.2 AND lane_offset <= 1.5 AND weather_risk <= 0.7 AND NOT (speed > 14 AND distance < 5) AND NOT (weather_risk > 0.6 AND distance < 6)

accepted_rule: distance >= 2.2 AND lane_offset <= 1.5 AND weather_risk <= 0.7 AND NOT (speed > 14 AND distance < 5) AND NOT (weather_risk > 0.6 AND distance < 6)
